---
title: "Exploring plasma and plaque repertoire (PCA-diversity-paired analysis of top reactivities"
output: html_notebook
---

#Libraries needed
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)
```

#PCA visualization of quantile normalized data accross tissue plasma and plaque
```{r}
##load data
joint_qn_file <-read.csv("/path_to_data_here/QN_both_tissues.csv",check.names = FALSE) 

#row= unique_coordinate 
#column=patient with intensity values (quantile nomalized)

##rename column to match with array name column
colnames(joint_qn_file)[1] <- "unique_coordinate"

#Pick sample columns & build matrix
sample_cols <- setdiff(names(joint_qn_file), "unique_coordinate")
M <- joint_qn_file %>% select(all_of(sample_cols))
rownames(M) <- joint_qn_file$unique_coordinate

#Samples x peptides
X <- t(as.matrix(M))

#Simple metadata from column names
tissue <- ifelse(grepl("^plaque_", rownames(X)), "plaque", "plasma")

#PCA
pca <- prcomp(X, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
var_exp <- (pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2)

scores <- data.frame(
  sample = rownames(pca$x),
  tissue = tissue[match(rownames(pca$x), rownames(X))],
  PC1 = pca$x[,1],
  PC2 = pca$x[,2],
  PC3 = pca$x[,3]
)

# plot
g <- ggplot(scores, aes(PC1, PC2, color = tissue)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.6, alpha = 0.95) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = tissue), level = 0.68, linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "PCA (QN) on all peptide reactivities",
       subtitle = paste0("Features used: ", ncol(X)),
       x = paste0("PC1 (", round(100*var_exp[1], 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(100*var_exp[2], 1), "%)")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

print(g)  # show in Plots pane

#save
ggsave("/data_path_here/PCA_QN_allReact.pdf", g, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

write.csv(scores, "/data_path_here/PCA_QN_allReact_scores.csv", row.names = FALSE)

#save loadings to see which peptides drive PCs
loadings <- data.frame(
  peptide = rownames(pca$rotation),
  PC1 = pca$rotation[,1],
  PC2 = pca$rotation[,2],
  PC3 = pca$rotation[,3]
)
write.csv(loadings, "/data_path_here/PCA_QN_allReact_loadings.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

-------------------------------
#DIVERSITY ANALYSIS
##Data loading and preprocessing (we need to work with non quantile normalized data for diversity analysis!)
```{r}
##Load csv files (not quantile normalised) containing replicate data
 #Column structure must be : 
  #[1] "peptide"        "variable"       "replica1"      
 #[4] "replica2"       "delta"          "sdev"          
 #[7] "avrg"           "cov_var"        "library"       
#[10] "cor_coef"       "lib_and_cor"    "sample_name"   
#[13] "tissue"         "organism"       "color_col"     
#[16] "status"         "Coordinate"     "sequence"      
#[19] "sequence_label" "is_duplicate" 

plasma_file<- read.delim("/path_to_data_here/aggregated/full_samples_combined.csv")

plaque_file <- read.delim("/path_to_data_here/aggregated/full_samples_combined.csv")

# Create unique peptide coordinate: "L1_C1_L1" etc...
plaque_file <- plaque_file %>%
  mutate(coordinate_unique = paste0(Coordinate, "_", library))

plasma_file <- plasma_file %>%
  mutate(coordinate_unique = paste0(Coordinate, "_", library))

# Keep only the columns we need to pivot
plaque_core <- plaque_file %>%
  select(coordinate_unique, sequence_label, sample_name, avrg)

plasma_core <- plasma_file %>%
  select(coordinate_unique, sequence_label, sample_name, avrg)

# Pivot to wide: one column per sample (plaque_284, plaque_417, ...)
plaque_cor_wide <- plaque_core %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = sample_name,
    values_from = avrg
  )

plasma_cor_wide <- plasma_core %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = sample_name,
    values_from = avrg
  )

##Remove "plaque_" from column names in the plaque table
plaque_cor_wide <- plaque_cor_wide %>%
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "^plaque_"), starts_with("plaque_"))

##Work out which columns are sample columns (not the two id columns)
id_cols <- c("coordinate_unique", "sequence_label")
plasma_samples <- setdiff(names(plasma_bis_wide), id_cols)
plaque_samples <- setdiff(names(plaque_clean),      id_cols)

##Take the intersection so we only keep samples present in BOTH (paired approach)
common_samples <- sort(intersect(plasma_samples, plaque_samples))

##Keep only those samples, and put them in the same order in both tibbles
plaque_matched <- plaque_clean %>%
  select(all_of(id_cols), all_of(common_samples)) 

plasma_matched<- plasma_cor_wide %>%
  select(all_of(id_cols), all_of(common_samples))
 
```

##Diversity indexes calculation (tresholde and untresholded) : shannon and gini indexes
```{r}
#Parameters that can be modified to calculate diversity indexes (here we calculated diversity for top 30% reactivities) 
keep_top_frac <- 0.30   # e.g., 0.30 = top 30%
array_size    <- 729    # total peptides on the array (optional, for normalization)

# Pull sample matrix; safely drop common id columns if present
get_sample_mat <- function(df_wide, id_cols = c("coordinate_unique","sequence_label","unique_coordinate")) {
  df_wide %>% select(-any_of(id_cols)) %>% as.data.frame()
}

# Gini coefficient (non-negative vector)
gini_coef <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x) & x >= 0]
  if (length(x) == 0 || sum(x) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  x <- sort(x)
  n <- length(x); S <- sum(x)
  (2 * sum(x * seq_len(n))) / (n * S) - (n + 1) / n
}

#Core function: keep only the top X% by rank 
calc_diversity_topfrac <- function(df_wide,
                                   tissue_label,
                                   keep_top_frac = 0.30) {
  stopifnot(is.numeric(keep_top_frac), keep_top_frac > 0, keep_top_frac <= 1)

  X       <- get_sample_mat(df_wide)
  samples <- names(X)

  res <- lapply(samples, function(s) {
    x <- as.numeric(X[[s]])
    x[is.na(x)] <- 0

    n_pep <- length(x)
    total <- sum(x)

    # Unthresholded metrics
    p  <- if (total > 0) x / total else x
    H  <- vegan::diversity(x, index = "shannon")
    R  <- sum(x > 0)
    J  <- if (R > 1) H / log(R) else NA_real_
    ED <- exp(H)
    HHI <- if (total > 0) sum(p^2) else NA_real_
    G   <- gini_coef(x)

    # Build top-fraction mask by rank (keeps exactly K largest)
    k_top <- max(1, ceiling(keep_top_frac * n_pep))
    ord   <- order(x, decreasing = TRUE)
    keep  <- rep(FALSE, n_pep); keep[ord[seq_len(k_top)]] <- TRUE

    x_thr <- ifelse(keep, x, 0)
    tot_m <- sum(x_thr)
    p_m   <- if (tot_m > 0) x_thr / tot_m else x_thr

    # Thresholded metrics (renormalized to survivors)
    R_thr <- sum(x_thr > 0)
    H_thr <- if (tot_m > 0) -sum(p_m[p_m > 0] * log(p_m[p_m > 0])) else NA_real_
    J_thr <- if (R_thr > 1 && is.finite(H_thr)) H_thr / log(R_thr) else NA_real_
    ED_thr <- if (is.finite(H_thr)) exp(H_thr) else NA_real_
    HHI_thr <- if (tot_m > 0) sum(p_m^2) else NA_real_
    G_thr <- gini_coef(x_thr)

    # Share of total intensity carried by the top-fraction peptides
    top_share <- if (total > 0) tot_m / total else NA_real_

    tibble(
      tissue = tissue_label,
      sample = s,
      peptides_total = n_pep,
      keep_top_frac = keep_top_frac,
      k_top = k_top,

      # Unthresholded
      richness_pos = R,
      shannon = H,
      evenness = J,
      effective_diversity = ED,
      HHI = HHI,
      gini = G,

      # Thresholded (top-fraction)
      richness_thr = R_thr,
      shannon_thr = H_thr,
      evenness_thr = J_thr,
      effective_diversity_thr = ED_thr,
      HHI_thr = HHI_thr,
      gini_thr = G_thr,
      top_share = top_share
    )
  })

  bind_rows(res)
}

# RUN on your wide matrices 
# Expecting: columns = id cols + sample IDs
#   plasma_matched
#   plaque_matched

plasma_top  <- calc_diversity_topfrac(plasma_matched, "plasma", keep_top_frac = keep_top_frac)
plaque_top  <- calc_diversity_topfrac(plaque_matched, "plaque", keep_top_frac = keep_top_frac)

div_all <- bind_rows(plasma_top, plaque_top) %>%
  mutate(
    eff_div_norm     = effective_diversity      / array_size,
    eff_div_thr_norm = effective_diversity_thr  / array_size
  )

#quick QC:
print(div_all %>% select(tissue, sample, keep_top_frac, k_top, top_share, shannon, gini, shannon_thr, gini_thr))

```

-------------------------------
#Forest plot style for paired analysis (plasma/plaque) of top X reactivities
```{r}
##(re)load join_QN_file data
df <- read.csv("/data_path_here/filename.csv")##containing sample IDs-unique peptide coordinate

clinical_data <- read.csv("/data_path_here/filename.csv") ###clinical data must at least contain : 
#[1] "Sample_full_ID"    (patient ID) and  #[1]X where X is a given clinical parameter (i.e SEX,AGE..etc...)   


peptide_info <- read.csv("/data_path_here/filename.csv") ##containing -unique peptide coordinate-peptide sequences
```

##Data preprocessing
```{r}
###Make a clean patient annotation table from clinical_data

df <- read.csv("/path_to_data_here/QN_both_tissues.csv",check.names = FALSE)##same file as above (joint QN normalized data)

patient_anno <- clinical_data %>%
  select(Sample_full_ID, Sex, Symptom) %>%
  mutate(Sample_full_ID = as.character(Sample_full_ID))

###Prepare peptide metadata with short peptide labels
peptide_meta <- peptide_info %>%
  select(coordinate_unique, sequence_label) %>%
  mutate(sequence_short = str_extract(sequence_label, "^[^-]+"))

###Reshape df (peptide × patients) to long format
df_long <- df %>%
  rename(coordinate_unique = 1) %>%  # make first col name explicit
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -coordinate_unique,
    names_to = "patient",
    values_to = "intensity"
  )

###Clean patient IDs (remove 'plaque_' prefix for matching)
df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(patient_id = str_replace(patient, "^plaque_", ""))

###Add patient annotation
df_long <- df_long %>%
  left_join(patient_anno, by = c("patient_id" = "Sample_full_ID"))

###Add peptide annotation
df_long <- df_long %>%
  left_join(peptide_meta, by = "coordinate_unique")

#Identify plasma vs plaque samples

df2 <- df_long %>%
  mutate(
    sample_type = if_else(str_detect(patient, "plaque_"), "Plaque", "Plasma"),
    patient_clean = str_replace(patient, "plaque_", "")
  )

#Compute mean intensity per peptide per sample type
mean_peptide <- df2 %>%
  group_by(sequence_short, sample_type) %>%
  summarise(mean_int = mean(intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sample_type, values_from = mean_int)
```

##Select top 10 peptides enriched in each tissue
```{r}
top10_plaque <- mean_peptide %>%
  arrange(desc(Plaque)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  pull(sequence_short)

top10_plasma <- mean_peptide %>%
  arrange(desc(Plasma)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  pull(sequence_short)

# Union — remove duplicates (if we have overlaping reativities in each top 10)
top_peptides <- union(top10_plaque, top10_plasma)
```

##Build patient-level paired data
```{r}
df_pairs <- df2 %>%
  filter(sequence_short %in% top_peptides) %>%
  group_by(sequence_short, patient_clean, sample_type) %>%
  summarise(mean_intensity = mean(intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample_type,
    values_from = mean_intensity
  ) %>%
  # Keep only true pairs (both measurements present)
  filter(!is.na(Plasma), !is.na(Plaque)) %>%
  mutate(diff = Plaque - Plasma)
```

##Compute paired t-tests + BH correction + CI (95%) + add significance
```{r}
df_summary_diff <- df_pairs %>%
  group_by(sequence_short) %>%
  summarise(
    n           = n(),
    mean_plasma = mean(Plasma, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_plaque = mean(Plaque, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_diff   = mean(diff,   na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_diff     = sd(diff,     na.rm = TRUE),
    se_diff     = sd_diff / sqrt(n),
    ci_low      = mean_diff - 1.96 * se_diff,
    ci_high     = mean_diff + 1.96 * se_diff,
    p_value     = t.test(Plaque, Plasma, paired = TRUE)$p.value,
    .groups     = "drop"
  ) %>%
  # multiple-testing correction for reporting only
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),

    # significance for coloring & stars based on *raw* p_value
    signif_label = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    ),
    sig_raw = p_value < 0.05,

    direction = case_when(
      mean_diff > 0  ~ "Higher in plaque",
      mean_diff < 0  ~ "Higher in plasma",
      TRUE           ~ "No difference"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(mean_diff) %>%
  mutate(sequence_short = factor(sequence_short, levels = sequence_short))

#Export CSVs
write.csv(df_pairs,"/data_save_path/filename.csv",row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(df_summary_diff,"/data_save_path/filename.csv",row.names = FALSE)
```

##Plot
```{r}
output_dir <- "/save_path/"

# Make sure the folder exists
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

output_file <- paste0(output_dir, "filename.pdf")

pdf(output_file, width = 9, height = 7, useDingbats = FALSE)

ggplot(df_summary_diff,
       aes(x = mean_diff, y = sequence_short)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +

  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ci_low, xmax = ci_high),
                 height = 0.15, color = "grey60") +

  # points: grey if non-significant by raw p
  geom_point(aes(color = ifelse(sig_raw, direction, "NS")),
             size = 3) +

  # stars: based on raw p (signif_label)
  geom_text(aes(label = signif_label),
            nudge_x = 0,
            vjust = -0.7,
            size = 3) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Higher in plaque" = "#ef8a62",
      "Higher in plasma" = "#67a9cf",
      "NS"               = "grey70"
    ),
    breaks = c("Higher in plaque", "Higher in plasma", "NS"),
    labels = c("Higher in plaque", "Higher in plasma", "Not significant (raw p ≥ 0.05)"),
    name   = ""
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Mean paired difference (Plaque - Plasma)",
    y = "Peptide"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank()
  )
# --- End plot ---
dev.off()
```
